disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began abruptly ~48 hours ago immediately after the breakdown of a central close relationship / support person
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before you started feeling this way?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about two days ago, right after I lost the one person I really relied on. Everything just collapsed after that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy, aching chest pressure across the central chest over the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest feeling?
Where in your chest is it and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a heavy, aching pressure across the middle of my chest. It's not sharp, just this constant heaviness.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete cessation of all food and fluid intake for ~48 hours with dry mouth and markedly reduced urine output
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat or drink anything?
When did you last have some water, and are you passing urine normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I honestly haven't eaten or drunk anything in about two days. My mouth is really dry and I've barely needed to go to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and near-fainting on sitting or standing up (postural / orthostatic symptom)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint when you sit up or stand?
Have you felt like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — every time I try to sit up I go all swimmy and dizzy, like I might pass out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Overwhelming hypersomnia and whole-body lethargy — sleeping most of the day, bedbound
trigger_question_examples: How are your energy levels and sleep?
Are you able to get up and move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stay awake. I'm sleeping almost the whole day and I can't get out of bed — my whole body feels like lead.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sense the heart is pounding / racing intermittently
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your heart racing or pounding?
Does your heart feel like it's working too hard?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my heart does feel like it's pounding sometimes, like it's working too hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound hopelessness and self-neglect; possible thoughts of self-harm or not wanting to go on — gated behind a sensitive, direct screen
trigger_question_examples: With everything feeling this heavy, have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that you'd be better off not here?
Sometimes when people feel this hopeless they think about not wanting to go on — has that been true for you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't know... I haven't planned anything. But honestly if I just didn't wake up, that wouldn't feel like the worst thing right now.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm just tired, that's all. I don't want to make a fuss.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Total social isolation — no emergency-contact network, phone deliberately switched off and out of reach
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you or who could check on you?
Who do you have around you at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's no one. The person I relied on is gone and I turned my phone off and put it in the other room. It's just me.
